data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a full audit trail from posted demand to bid set to awarded assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this audit trail exists. The linked use case mentions the need for a fully traceable history, but without specific evidence to support it, there is a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence of a full audit trail from posted demand to bid set to awarded assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail validation check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the audit trail exists and is complete from demand to assignment.
